summary: Lo‑fi audience tape with modest sound quality, capturing a relaxed but unremarkable Dead show.
review: The recording is an audience‑sourced reel‑to‑reel capture that sounds “easy on the ears” but lacks the clarity of professional tapes. Reviewers note its laid‑back vibe and occasional crowd chatter, yet there are no standout musical moments mentioned. Overall the performance feels modest and the audio quality is only fair.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 2‑star review was provided, indicating dissatisfaction with both the recording and the show; no positive comments were found to raise the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Fan‑made reel‑to‑reel tape with battery issues during the first set; audible crowd chatter and a generally lo‑fi mix, but no major distortion reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a laid‑back, easy‑going performance with no particular highlights noted.
